headline: Lenovo (SEHK:992) Expands Hybrid AI Offerings And Launches Tab Plus Gen 2
summary: Lenovo Group (SEHK:992) expanded its Hybrid AI Advantage portfolio with new AI inferencing solutions and platforms for hybrid deployment. The company announced fresh collaborations with NVIDIA, Intel, Red Hat, and Canonical to support enterprise AI workloads. Lenovo also introduced the Tab Plus Gen 2 tablet, which includes upgraded audio visual features, multitasking tools, and AI-driven functions for consumers.
